intro: Two open items were investigated against newly-provided broker P&L and resolved this revision. The figures below are transcribed from the broker statements; account numbers, client codes and PAN are omitted.

resolved.source: Groww stock-level P&L view · 01 May 2024 – 01 May 2025
resolved.prior: Carried in the open book as a pledged position — 2,441 sh at cost ₹2,44,710.25, mark pending.
resolved.finding: The 2,441-share buy was the entry leg of an intraday round-trip, not a hold: bought ₹100.25 and sold ₹100.26 in the same session (01 Oct 2024). The broker's own stock P&L shows buy value ₹12,48,013.03 against sell value ₹12,51,522.32 — every share bought was sold.
resolved.resolution: No open or pledged OLA position exists. Closed; realised +₹3,509.29 across four round-trips, already in the record. The OLA mark is no longer a pending item.

resolved.source: Zerodha Console P&L · combined equity · 30 Nov 2023 – 13 Jun 2026 (generated 12 Jun 2026)
resolved.prior: 26 sh shown open at the Aug-2024 window end; the exit fell outside the provided statements, so its P&L was excluded from all totals and flagged pending.
resolved.finding: The full-period Console P&L now covers the disposal and shows LODHA fully closed: 52 sh bought and sold, buy value ₹74,429.60, sell value ₹79,318.10, realised +₹4,888.50 (+6.57%), unrealised ₹0.
resolved.resolution: Position closed. Total realised +₹4,888.50: ₹3,993.50 already sits in the dated-lot cadence; the +₹895.00 tail is statement-confirmed (amount exact). The export does not date the tail lots, so it is disclosed here rather than placed in a specific cadence month — the headline stays conservative until the dated lots are available.
